violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Sanitizing test strips were not available for checking sanitizers. Strips should be available to check that proper strength is used to sanitize equipment.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles area acoustic in kitchen. Tiles should be nonabsorbent and easily cleanable. **Looking to finish replacement this weekend.
